title: ANC - 7.-ANC is OFF and Transparency is OFF, both without selected values, and during call User sets ANC to ON
scenario: When ANC and Transparency are both OFF, joining a call and turning ANC ON leaves it ON with Adaptive after the call ends, allowing mode switching afterward.
steps: Start/join a call - ANC stays OFF, Transparency is greyed out.
Set ANC ON - ANC activates with Adaptive value selected.
Leave the call - ANC remains ON with Adaptive, Transparency stays OFF.
Toggle ANC/Transparency modes - User can switch between them.
expected: ANC activates with Adaptive value selected when set to ON during a call. After leaving the call, ANC remains ON with Adaptive, Transparency stays OFF, and the user can toggle between ANC/Transparency modes.
